comment: Versioned Contractor identity (ADR-0003, SC-S2) — the Evergreen prime entity printed in the subcontract preamble ({{contractor_entity}}), the signature block ({{signature_entity}}), and the default {{prime_contractor}}. NEVER hard-code these in render code; bump config_version on any change. The prime-contractor default is overridable per subcontract; subcontract_generate may derive an of-<state> form from the job-site state.
